_comment: Android update manifest. bump versionCode in build.gradle.kts AND android.json each release.
notes: Games now has curated 'popular play areas' spots for every game — Monster Hunter Now, Pikmin Bloom and Ingress get the shared list + game-specific extras + a link to each game's community tools. Plus a 2-3 route options picker and an opt-in per-game speed guardrail.
